description_long: This object is a modern train with a streamlined, rectangular body and smooth, rounded edges. The exterior is predominantly a light gray color, with minimal visible surface details except for a small, dark linear feature on one side that may represent a logo or technical marking. The train appears to lack visible windows or doors, giving it a monolithic and minimalist appearance. The body is boxy and uniform, suggesting it is a single carriage or a compact train unit. The surface is hard and smooth, likely constructed from metal or composite materials typical of urban rail vehicles. There are no visible overhead wires, pantographs, or other external attachments.
description: A sleek, minimalist light gray train with a boxy, streamlined body and no visible windows or doors. The surface is smooth and hard, with a small marking on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows a slightly angled side of the train with a small, dark marking visible near the lower center.
description_view_1: This view displays the long, flat side of the train with smooth, uninterrupted surfaces and rounded corners.
description_view_2: This view is similar to view 1, showing the opposite long side, also smooth and featureless.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite angled side, again with a small marking visible, mirroring view 0.
